query:
-- TESTE 2: Gerenciamento de Corretores - Camila
-- 1. Verificar que Camila é gerente da Baggio
SELECT id, name, email, role, companyId, managerId FROM users 
WHERE email = 'camila.pires@baggioimoveis.com.br';

-- 2. Listar todos os corretores vinculados à Camila
SELECT id, name, email, companyId, managerId FROM users 
WHERE role = 'broker' AND managerId = 'user_1766355292097_jsj9336kf' AND companyId = 'company_1766331506068';

-- 3. Para cada corretor, contar vendas e comissões (dados que Camila deve ver)
SELECT 
  u.name as corretor,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.brokerVendedor = u.id THEN s.id END) as vendas_como_vendedor,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.brokerAngariador = u.id THEN s.id END) as vendas_como_angariador,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) as comissoes
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN sales s ON (s.brokerVendedor = u.id OR s.brokerAngariador = u.id) AND s.companyId = 'company_1766331506068'
LEFT JOIN commissions c ON c.brokerId = u.id AND c.companyId = 'company_1766331506068'
WHERE u.role = 'broker' AND u.managerId = 'user_1766355292097_jsj9336kf'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3eAQdaRY4zkjYsC.95a35ec57269 --database FWQUTMFHrecTsndnoBiUKo --execute 
-- TESTE 2: Gerenciamento de Corretores - Camila
-- 1. Verificar que Camila é gerente da Baggio
SELECT id, name, email, role, companyId, managerId FROM users 
WHERE email = 'camila.pires@baggioimoveis.com.br';

-- 2. Listar todos os corretores vinculados à Camila
SELECT id, name, email, companyId, managerId FROM users 
WHERE role = 'broker' AND managerId = 'user_1766355292097_jsj9336kf' AND companyId = 'company_1766331506068';

-- 3. Para cada corretor, contar vendas e comissões (dados que Camila deve ver)
SELECT 
  u.name as corretor,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.brokerVendedor = u.id THEN s.id END) as vendas_como_vendedor,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.brokerAngariador = u.id THEN s.id END) as vendas_como_angariador,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) as comissoes
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN sales s ON (s.brokerVendedor = u.id OR s.brokerAngariador = u.id) AND s.companyId = 'company_1766331506068'
LEFT JOIN commissions c ON c.brokerId = u.id AND c.companyId = 'company_1766331506068'
WHERE u.role = 'broker' AND u.managerId = 'user_1766355292097_jsj9336kf'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name;
